text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky and I go shopping together one
day...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hmm... These green onions look wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Could I have some of these along with
the cabbage?

text_block_list.name: Vegetable Seller
text_block_list.text:
You certainly have a good eye for produce! Take
a raffle ticket too, as a gift!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
A gift? You're giving them out to everyone, aren't
you?

text_block_list.name: Vegetable Seller
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! You caught me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you waiting, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you waiting, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yep, I'm all set!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But let's enjoy our day a bit longer! You see, that
old lady told me something interesting...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ta-da! Shall we try it together?
choice_data_list: Oh, I see! You want to play the raffle?
Oh, I see! You want to play the raffle?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: That's right! I got a ticket from the lady at the grocery store! We can't not use it, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And if I win, I thought I could reward you for
coming out with me today by giving you the prize!
choice_data_list: Do you really think you'll win?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And if I win, I thought I could reward you for
coming out with me today by giving you the prize!
choice_data_list: Do you really think you'll win?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You dare doubt me? Haha! Well, I can't wait to
see your reaction when I win the grand-prize! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Without further ado, allow me to show you the
fabled Maruzen luck!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: C'mon, grand-prize! Let's see that grand-prize!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky hums as she cranks the handle of the
raffle spinner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: What?! I can't believe it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trainer, did you hear that?! I won the grand-prize!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trainer, did you hear that?! I won the grand-prize!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I know, right?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So, here you go! This bodacious prize is all yours,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So, here you go! This bodacious prize is all yours,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel guilty receiving something like this just for
going shopping with Maruzensky. And besides,
she's the one who won it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on. You don't have to be so serious all
the time!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Okay! How about we make it a date
instead, then?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, just like today's shopping trip! You'll come
with me on the hot spring trip!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, just like today's shopping trip! You'll come
with me on the hot spring trip!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But I'm mega busy this year...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So how about next spring? I'm sure we'll have
some free time then.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Done deal! I'll invite you when I get everything
sorted out!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to make this trip a lot of fun, so be
ready to have a blast!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how I end up promising to go on a hot
spring trip with Maruzensky next year.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Booyah! As if there were any doubt! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ehehe!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heh... Sorry, I got a bit carried away, didn't I?
choice_data_list:
You got the first place prize, so you should feel
happy.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Just remember you said that when I go even more over the top! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Just remember you said that when I go even more over the top! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ahem...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we eat this hamburger steak together
for lunch?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we eat this hamburger steak together
for lunch?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! I'm glad to see you can cut loose a little
yourself! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! I'm glad to see you can cut loose a little
yourself! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how Maruzensky and I end up sharing a
deluxe carrot hamburger steak for our next lunch.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wow! That sure is a lot!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But having this many carrots is kind of too much,
even between the both of us... Carrots go bad
fast, after all.
choice_data_list: How about sharing them with everyone, then?
How about sharing them with everyone, then?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But having this many carrots is kind of too much,
even between the both of us... Carrots go bad
fast, after all.
choice_data_list: How about sharing them with everyone, then?
How about sharing them with everyone, then?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ooh, nice idea, flour tortilla! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, who's hungry?! Come get some carrots!

text_block_list.name: The Two
text_block_list.text: Yaaay!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Teehee! Everyone's looking stoked after gobbling
up those carrots!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Why thank you! ♪ But don't forget yours, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Why thank you! ♪ But don't forget yours, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky and I each take a single carrot for
ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're slightly salty and have a hardiness that
soaks pleasantly into our tired bodies.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Aww, dang!
choice_data_list: Well, at least you won something, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I guess a little bit of good luck is better
than none at all.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But a single carrot doesn't really make for a great
present... Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! I'll use this and the green onions I
bought earlier to make a stir-fry!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's my mom's secret recipe, so it'll be the bomb!
You're gonna love it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later on, we enjoy a delicious stir-fry made with
the carrot that Maruzensky won in the raffle.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, that's a blank—tough luck! Here's this pack
of tissues as a consolation prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Bogus! I can't believe it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Sorry, Trainer. My Maruzen luck let me
down today...
choice_data_list: It's okay. You win some, you lose some.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Sorry, Trainer. My Maruzen luck let me
down today...
choice_data_list: It's okay. You win some, you lose some.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Aww, I wanted to win you something nice... Mega
lame...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Maruzensky's shoulders drooping, we leave
the shopping street.
